response: The iPhone 15 Pro starts at $999 and features a vibrant 6.1-inch OLED display powered by Apple’s new A17 Pro chip. It boasts a 48 MP main camera, a 3,274 mAh battery and comes in storage capacities of 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB or 1 TB, all wrapped in a sleek 187 g frame. With a user rating of 4.6 out of 5, it delivers top-tier performance and versatile imaging for demanding users.
